enlargement_p_6: DHT (dihydrotestosterone) is the hormone responsible for the growth of male tissue during puberty. Its decrease after the age of 25 slows down cell regeneration. We restore its level with natural stimulants.
enlargement_p_8: The cavernous body consists of “chambers” that expand with blood. If the flow is weak, these chambers do not expand to their full capacity — the true size is not revealed.
enlargement_p_10: Frequent masturbation and diabetes weaken the walls of cavernous tissue. We repair them with Omega-3 and plant collagen — they regain elasticity and expand more.

enlargement_p_28: Grown tissue does not retract — because it is real tissue and not a temporary "bulge." The result stays with you.
